Hi Fernando, this is Sarah. I want a quick update on the project. Are you on track with the deadline? Last week you said the team was on stage two. Please send me a short update. I want to know the progress and the next milestone. If there is a delay, tell me soon. Thank you.

Good morning, everyone. Here is a short update on our project. We are currently on stage three. The team is working on the new center, and we are on track with the deadline. We are not behind schedule. The first milestone is complete, and the next milestone is the patient area. Thank you for your hard work.
